column11: Hi. I would like to cancel / close my account with cinnox since my mainly German customers prefer to use whatsapp or telegram instead support, rather than calling a HK phone line. I could not find any option to close my account. Can u assist pls?
one moment.  Let me check with my colleague.
My colleagues seems out for lunch.  Will update you once my colleagues is back.
yes please! coz i really cannot use the account and want to avoid unnecessary charges. big thank you.
will you update through email? because i will not be online here later
yes sure.  May I have your email address?
thank you.  we will get back to you by email.  Have a nice day.
you too and many thanks for your lovely care. truly appreciate it
